name: BoundInsightEvidence
description: INSIGHTS-owned validated projection of one BUDGET composite result across bound and absent plan states; it is ephemeral and never a second source of truth.
schema_def: BoundInsightEvidence {budgetPeriod, planState, planRevisionDetail?, budgetPosition?, datedActualMembers[], ledgerBudgetActualTotal, categoryLifecycleEvidence, budgetContractVersion, ledgerContractVersion, ledgerSnapshotId, ledgerGenerationFingerprint, calculationSchemaVersion?, evidenceBindingFingerprint}.
DatedActualMember {ordinal, stableTransactionEvidenceId, effectiveDate, signedActualMinorUnits, stableCategoryId?, bucketKind}.

BoundRevision invariants: planRevisionDetail, budgetPosition, and calculationSchemaVersion are present; one complete ordered member set shares the position snapshot and generation; every member reconciles exactly once to Budgeted, ZeroBudget, Unbudgeted, or Uncategorized; checked member totals equal both ledgerBudgetActualTotal and BudgetPosition actual totals.

Plan-absence invariants: planRevisionDetail, budgetPosition, and calculationSchemaVersion are absent; no zero or empty plan is fabricated; the complete ordered members remain present; their checked exact sum equals ledgerBudgetActualTotal; calculator invocation is forbidden.
All states fail whole-report binding on unknown, duplicate, missing, stale, incompatible, over-limit, or mismatched evidence.
Ephemeral only: no member, cursor, plan, or position payload is stored by INSIGHTS.
